title: Master ARIA Design Patterns
description: Architect complex UI components (e.g., Comboboxes, Data Grids, Tree Views) following W3C ARIA design patterns. Implement appropriate keyboard interactions and role signaling for ARIA-enhanced components.
objectives: Architect complex UI components (e.g., Comboboxes, Data Grids, Tree Views) following W3C ARIA design patterns.
Implement appropriate keyboard interactions and role signaling for ARIA-enhanced components.
